issues.sample: When driving at highway speeds (65mph-75mph) the steering rack in Lexus gs350 (4th generation models) will seem “sticky” on “swooping turns”. A slight jerk is the only way to get out of this sticky feeling. The steering racks have been a major issue with these cars and seem fairl

narrative.headline: What 2019 Lexus Gs owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 1 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (100% of reports).
